propositions: Stamp denormalized author name+email and optional author_id onto every mutating event envelope at all four composer sites.
author_id is included only when resolve_current_identity returns non-None, and omitted otherwise.
Attribution is computed via a repo_root-keyed module cache so git-email lookup and identity resolution run at most once per repo_root per process.
Reducer surfaces author_email/author_id present-only at the same structural location each processor stamps author (top-level for create, per-entry for comment/revert/signature).
Pre-change events lacking author_email/author_id reduce byte-identically with no new keys added anywhere.
author_email() returns empty string and never raises when git config user.email is unset or the git call fails.
